name: industroyer_sweep
description: Models the December 2016 attack on a Kyiv transmission substation by Industroyer / CRASHOVERRIDE (MITRE campaign C0025, software S0604), the first malware purpose-built to speak grid protocols. Its protocol modules drove IEC 60870-5-101/104, IEC 61850, and OPC directly to change the state of switches and breakers, sweeping them and rapidly toggling state to keep them open. This scenario reproduces that pattern over TASE.2: automated discovery, a coordinated breaker sweep across the bay, a rapid open/close toggling flood, and a manipulated operator view, against the live grid so the sweep produces a real cascade. ATT&CK for ICS: T0888 Remote System Information Discovery, T0832 Manipulation of View, T0855 Unauthorized Command Message, T0831 Manipulation of Control, T0814 Denial of Service.

timeline.note: automated discovery: the module reads the object model on association
manipulate the operator view: pin the tie-line flow to a calm value
rapid open/close toggling: the malware's state-flip loop
